license_review_basis: Human review by twang05 on 2026-07-15 of the linked Bioconductor muscData package record and documentation. The source was confirmed for use in this academic benchmark with source attribution. This dataset is used only as a supplemental statistical benchmark and is not represented as Perturb-seq.
note: This is an independent statistical golden set, not a Perturb-seq dataset. Release evaluation requires a frozen conversion lock.
